content.en:
Aromu Fortress.

Ye Tian came back with the realm of the ancient demon level, and immediately sensed the suppression of himself by the Huoxi space-time battlefield, and he could only exert a small part of his strength.

However, even if he could only exert a little strength, his combat power was still far superior to that of the second time on the Emperor List.

Dragonsman Tribes Station.

When the Longshu Ancient Demon and the others saw Ye Tian coming back, they congratulated, "Congratulations to Tian for breaking through to the Ancient Demon Level!"

"Dragon Ancient Demon, I'm going to stay here for a long time, do any of the three of you want to go back?"

Ye Tian asked.

Long Chen spoke: "I want to return to the Dragon Disciple Tribe, my strength is not strong, and I can't get too many opportunities in the Huoxi Time and Space Battlefield, and it is not easy to improve my strength." Moreover, the Dragons' tribe needs me too. "

"Okay, that Longchen Ancient Demon, you can go back!"

Ye Tian said.

Immediately, the Longchen Ancient Demon left the Arrow Mu Fortress and returned to the Dragonsman Tribe.

And Ye Tian broke through to the ancient demon level, and his ranking also disappeared from the emperor list of the Arrow Mu Fortress.

At the beginning, many emperor-level and even ancient demon level thought that Ye Tian had fallen, but after inquiring, they learned that Ye Tian had broken through to the ancient demon level.

...... 25

"How quickly did Tian choose to break through to the Ancient Demon Level?"

Amusha was also shocked when he heard the news, after all, it hadn't been long since Ye Tian became the second on the Emperor List, and it hadn't even been long since he entered the Emperor List, and he had only participated in the space-time Ancient Demon Pillar projection once.

You must know that she has been enlightened many times, but now it has no effect on her, so she is too lazy to comprehend.

But for a powerhouse like Ye Tian, if he visited the first few times, the effect should be very good.

But Ye Tian chose to break through directly to the ancient demon level, and did not continue to stay in the emperor list, which is a huge loss!

"This guy probably can't wait to become an ancient demon-level powerhouse!"

Amusa muttered.

"Soon, it won't be long before I can create my own form secret method that suits me, and then I can absorb the other three form secret methods, so that I have the potential to break through to the ancient demon level. Amusha said secretly.

She had never been worried that she would not be able to break through to the Ancient Demon level, because she had a certain amount of confidence in her own secret method of creating forms, but it would take a long time of hard work to create.

And now, she felt that the time was coming for her to create this form of secret method.

Really.

It didn't take long for Amusa to successfully create a form secret method, and the moment she cultivated this form secret method, she forcibly devoured the other three form secret methods, severely weakening her own strength.

After all, the self-created form secret method can fit perfectly with the physical body, and it can also devour other form secret methods, but it will cause the three form secret methods to shatter and no longer be able to be used, which will make the strength plummet.

But Amusha didn't care about this, after all, after she broke through to the ancient demon level, she could cultivate several other form secret methods in a short period of time, and her strength would still increase.

Another period of time passed, and Amusa successfully cultivated his self-created form secret method to the second form, and spent countless resources to cultivate the second form to the consummation realm.

"You can hit the ancient demon level!"

Amusa returned to the main headquarters of the Aro Mother and went into retreat.

Of course, few people know about this news.

......

"Hahahaha, the third form of the Ten Thousand Laws form has finally been created by me!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

During this time, he had been staying in the Arrow Mu Fortress, focusing on creating the third form of the Ten Thousand Law Form, after all, if he practiced the third form, his strength would skyrocket.

And now, he has finally created the third form of the Ten Thousand Law Form, and it takes a lot of resources to practice this third form.

But the resources he had obtained from the Ancient Demon Realm were precious enough to help him cultivate the third form of the Ten Thousand Laws form.

In this way, another period of time passed, and Ye Tian finally practiced the third form of the Ten Thousand Law Form, and his strength was transformed.

In the third form state, Ye Tian's physical body was even more terrifying, and he could even be immune to the attacks of ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouses, and his strength in all aspects had been greatly improved.

Ye Tian felt that the third form of his Ten Thousand Law Forms was comparable to the fourth form of other Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, after all, those Ancient Demon-level powerhouses were cultivating other people's form secret methods, not their own form secret methods, so the increase in strength would naturally not be too high.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian worked hard to improve the third form of the Ten Thousand Law Form, and at the same time, he was also trying to create the third form of the Arrow Golden Body Form, as well as the third form of the Arrow Arm Form, if he also created it, his strength would be terrifyingly improved.

At the same time, his cultivation was also working hard to improve, striving to break through to the limit of ordinary ancient demon level as soon as possible.

......

this day.

And here, several emperor-level powerhouses fought, causing an area to shatter, causing a treasure aura to leak out, and just the breath shocked these emperor-level and made them unable to move.

Immediately, they knew that the value of this treasure was extremely high, far beyond what they could set foot into, so they immediately notified the ancient demon-level powerhouses behind them, 660.

And soon, the news of this place was exposed, and it spread to many nearby fortresses.

Aromu Fortress.

Ao Retro Demon and other powerhouses also knew about this treasure, and rushed over as soon as possible, and Ye Tian was also notified.

"It is suspected that the ultimate space-time ancient treasure has been born!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The Ultimate Time and Space Ancient Treasure is actually the Ultimate Ancient Treasure, the grade is the same, but the value is different.

The ultimate space-time ancient treasure is the kind of ultimate ancient treasure whose attributes contain the ultimate particles of space-time, and this time it is obviously not an ordinary grade of the ultimate space-time ancient treasure, it is very likely to be a peak-level ultimate space-time ancient treasure, even if such a treasure is to let the peak ancient demon powerhouse come here, it will be desperately snatched and get it at all costs.

It is conceivable that it will soon become a meat grinding ground for the ancient demon-level powerhouse, and many rules will be broken at that time, and the ancient demon-level powerhouse is afraid that they will kill wildly, and many ancient demon-level powerhouses will fall because of this.

But even if they knew, they were still extremely terrifying Ultimate Time and Space Ancient Treasure, once they obtained it, it would be too helpful to themselves, and even help the peak Ancient Demon level powerhouse to impact the Ultimate Ancient Demon!

Therefore, no master is willing to give up such a treasure!

Wow!

Ye Tian also rushed over as soon as possible, and he was naturally interested in such an ultimate space-time ancient treasure.
